title: Language Change - Houston Screen - Retry
scenario: Verify that changing the language on a Poly headset via Device Settings shows a "Houston screen" error and Retry button when the update fails due to headset power-off during the first 20% of the update.
steps: Pair and connect the Poly headset to the device.
Select a new language from the available options.
During the first 20% of the update, turn off the headset to simulate an update failure.
Observe the error message displayed on the screen.
Click the Retry button and verify it redirects the user to retry the update process.
expected: A "Houston screen" error message appears, and the Retry button redirects the user to retry the update process.
